[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000001101 3
2 100001000 2
3 100000110 3
4 100111010 5
5 000101111 5
6 000001010 2
7 101101001 5
